title: Add log_level config option
summary: The k8s Grafana Agent charm hardcodes the agent server log level to 'info' in src/grafana_agent.py (_server_config: {"log_level": "info"}). The machine charm already added a user-facing `log_level` config option (canonical/grafana-agent-operator PR #217) accepting debug/info/warn/error and falling back to info on invalid input. This issue asks to bring the same option to the k8s charm for consistency.
why_good_first_issue: Small, well-scoped feature with an existing reference implementation to copy (machine charm PR #217). The render site is a single hardcoded line and the charm already reads other options via self.config[...]. Clear definition of done: add the option in charmcraft.yaml, wire it into _server_config with validation+fallback, add a unit/scenario test. No deep architecture knowledge required.
affected_files: charmcraft.yaml (options block, ~line 125); src/grafana_agent.py:896 (hardcoded log_level); tests/unit or tests/scenario
repro_steps: multipass exec cos -- git clone --depth 80 https://github.com/canonical/grafana-agent-k8s-operator ~/work/grafana-agent-k8s-operator; multipass exec cos -- bash -lc 'cd ~/work/grafana-agent-k8s-operator && export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && tox -e unit'; prove the gap: grep -n 'log_level' charmcraft.yaml (none) and sed -n '890,900p' src/grafana_agent.py (hardcoded).
repro_result: confirmed-by-inspection + green baseline: `tox -e unit` => unit: OK (28.8s), TOTAL coverage 78% (suite passes). charmcraft.yaml options block (tls_insecure_skip_verify, always_enable_*, tracing_sample_rate_*) has NO log_level option. src/grafana_agent.py:896 hardcodes server_config = {"log_level": "info"} with no way to override. Reference impl exists: canonical/grafana-agent-operator PR #217 (levels debug/info/warn/error, invalid -> info + WARNING).
fix_hint: Add to charmcraft.yaml options: log_level (string, default 'info', describe allowed values debug/info/warn/error). In src/grafana_agent.py _server_config, replace the literal 'info' with a validated read of self.config['log_level'] (lowercase, validate against {debug,info,warn,error}, fall back to 'info' and logger.warning on invalid), mirroring grafana-agent-operator PR #217. Add a test setting log_level=error and asserting it lands in the rendered server config.
notes: Issue is Type: Enhancement + Status: Triage but is genuinely beginner-friendly with a concrete reference PR. Verified the related #131 (positions_dir) is already addressed (charm.py:261 returns '/run') and #230 (tox pollution) is effectively obsolete (post-`tox -e unit` git status is clean; the 3 alert/dashboard dirs are gitignored and not created at repo root), so neither was picked.

title: Copy-paste docstring and wrong NotImplementedError message in GrafanaAgentCharm abstract methods
summary: In the abstract-methods section of src/grafana_agent.py (base class GrafanaAgentCharm), two stale copy-paste defects exist: (1) `_additional_log_configs` has the docstring 'Additional per-type integrations to inject.' which is identical to `_additional_integrations` above it and does not describe log configs; (2) `is_command_changed` raises NotImplementedError('Please override the command method') naming the wrong method ('command' instead of 'is_command_changed'), unlike every other abstract method which names itself correctly.
why_good_first_issue: Pure documentation/accuracy cleanup with an unambiguous correct form derived from the surrounding code. No behavior change, no architecture knowledge needed. Each sibling abstract method provides the correct pattern to follow. Clear done: docstring describes log configs; error message names is_command_changed.
repro_steps: multipass exec cos -- bash -lc 'cd ~/work/grafana-agent-k8s-operator && sed -n "525,567p" src/grafana_agent.py'; grep -n 'Additional per-type integrations to inject\|Please override the command method' src/grafana_agent.py
repro_result: confirmed-by-inspection: src/grafana_agent.py line 532 (_additional_integrations) and line 537 (_additional_log_configs) carry the IDENTICAL docstring 'Additional per-type integrations to inject.'; the 537 copy is wrong for a log-configs method. Line 563: is_command_changed (defined line 561) raises NotImplementedError('Please override the command method') -- wrong method name; all sibling abstract methods (restart->'restart method', metrics_jobs->'metrics_jobs method', etc.) correctly name themselves. Subclass overrides exist (charm.py:116 is_command_changed, charm.py:198 _additional_log_configs) so these are the developer-facing contract.
fix_hint: Change the line 537 docstring to something like 'Additional per-type log configs to inject.'; change the line 563 message to 'Please override the is_command_changed method'. Optional: run `tox -e lint` to confirm no regressions (text-only change).
notes: Self-identified because the open issues are mostly obsolete/vague: #230 effectively fixed, #131 already addressed, #41 (config comments) is Priority: Low and underspecified (yaml.safe_dump output has no comment support without ruamel). This cleanup is a cleaner, verifiable beginner task. Unit suite green (28 tests OK).
